name: dark, fibrous material
identity: A handful of dark, fibrous material extracted from a steaming wooden bowl by the elder, presented to the player character as an offering or test.
current_status: Held in the player character's partially freed hand. The material has a coarse texture, an earthy scent mixed with something pungent and slightly bitter/medicinal. The elder has signaled for the player's restraints to be loosened.

volatile_state.current_activity: being smelled and examined by the player character

notes: Unknown purpose or nature of the material; context suggests it may be a potion, offering, or test item.
